name: create-release
description: GitHub Workflows to create and publish releases with semantic versioning

scripts.start: if [ -d src/action.ts ]; then node --import tsx/esm src/index.ts; fi
scripts.build: if [ -d src/action.ts ]; then esbuild src/action.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --outfile=dist/index.cjs; fi
scripts.lint: if [ -d src/action.ts ]; then eslint src/ --ext .ts && prettier --check src/; fi
scripts.lint-fix: if [ -d src/action.ts ]; then eslint src/ --fix; fi
scripts.format: if [ -d src/action.ts ]; then prettier --write src/; fi
